scripts.dev: cross-env PORT=3333 concurrently --kill-others "cross-env PORT=3333 npm run dev -w packages/server" "wait-on tcp:3333 && cross-env VITE_API_PORT=3333 npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.dev:server: cross-env PORT=3333 npm run dev -w packages/server
scripts.dev:client: cross-env VITE_API_PORT=3333 npm run dev -w packages/client
